description: A quiet visitor becomes a fixture of the store. Over time their daily ritual reveals a story of memory and quiet resilience.

phases.narrative_text: She's here every day. One of the regulars.
She lingered near the new display longer than usual. Something about it seemed familiar.

phases.payoff_text: She left a folded note at her usual spot: 'I've been coming here a long time. It's not the same place anymore — but then, neither am I. Thank you for keeping it open.'

description: A sharp-tongued local reviewer shows up with a notebook and suspicious eyes. Consistent quality earns a grudging upgrade.

phases.narrative_text: A visitor with a notebook. He doesn't look impressed.
He bought something. He'll probably return it. He's scribbling in the notebook again.

phases.payoff_text: A review appears in the local feed: 'Four stars. The fifth is being held in reserve for the day they fix the pretzel cart location.'

description: Utility readings in an empty storefront run at suspicious levels. Someone may be using the space after hours.

phases.narrative_text: Unit 7B shows a minor utility draw. Possible HVAC issue — monitoring.
A figure was seen departing the unit at 6:44 AM. They were carrying a laptop bag.

phases.payoff_text: A note appears under your door: 'I know I shouldn't have been here. Thank you for not making it worse than it had to be. The mall is better than I expected.'

description: An old rumor circulates about a kid who once lived in this mall during the summer of 1994. Some things turn out to be true.

phases.narrative_text: Community buzz: 'Anyone remember the story about the kid who lived in the mall in the 90s? My mom swore it was true.'
Workers found an old inscription during maintenance: 'P.A. + Pete — Summer 1994. This place saved me.'

phases.payoff_text: An anonymous post: 'It's real. I was there. The mall was the safest place I'd ever been. I'm glad it's still open.'
